steps.label: cause
steps.text: The winemaker chooses whether the desired wine style needs softer acidity and greater roundness or sharper acidity and fresher primary fruit.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: MLF can be encouraged by inoculation and suitable temperature, or blocked through hygiene, sulfur dioxide, cooling, filtration, and timely stabilization.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: Inducing or blocking MLF becomes a deliberate style decision rather than an automatic step in every wine.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: Inducing or blocking MLF becomes a deliberate style decision rather than an automatic step in every wine.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
